title: Interactive Rebase Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git's interactive rebase functionality.

questions.question: Which of these is the correct command for starting an interactive rebase for your last 3 commits?
Regarding interactive rebase, what does the 'squash' instruction do?
options: It combines a commit with the one before it
It marks a commit as final

questions.question: Which instruction allowed you to edit a specific commit's message or content during an interactive rebase?
options: Both edit and reword are used for different purposes during a rebase
